user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a type of work, so that employees can classify their timesheet entries against defined work types
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Type Of Work Settings screen; When I click Add type of work and provide the details; Then a new type of work is created and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view types of work with their non productive, non productive reason, non billable and invoice status/type attributes, so that I can review how each is classified
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Type Of Work Settings screen; When the list loads; Then each row shows Name, Is non productive, Non productive reason, Is non billable and Invoice status/Invoice type

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing type of work, so that I can keep classifications accurate
acceptance_criteria: Given a type of work exists in the list; When I click Edit on that row; Then I can modify and save its billability and productivity attributes

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through and refresh the list of types of work, so that I can browse all entries across multiple pages
acceptance_criteria: Given more than one page of types of work exists; When I use the pagination controls or click refresh; Then the corresponding page of entries is displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to navigate to the Timesheet Approvers and Short Time Settings tabs, so that I can manage related configuration in context
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Type Of Work Settings screen; When I select the Timesheet Approvers or Short Time Settings tab; Then the corresponding configuration screen opens

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to proceed to the next step or cancel, so that I can control the configuration workflow
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Type Of Work Settings screen; When I click Next or Cancel; Then I advance in the flow or discard changes respectively
